dms.endpoint.elasticsearchsettings.CfnAb: Provides information that defines an OpenSearch endpoint.

dms.endpoint.elasticsearchsettings.Endpo.Description: The endpoint for the OpenSearch cluster. AWS DMS uses HTTPS if a transport protocol (http/https) is not specified.

dms.endpoint.elasticsearchsettings.Error.Description: The maximum number of seconds for which DMS retries failed API requests to the OpenSearch cluster.

dms.endpoint.elasticsearchsettings.FullL.Description: The maximum percentage of records that can fail to be written before a full load operation stops.  To avoid early failure, this counter is only effective after 1000 records are transferred. OpenSearch also has the concept of error monitoring during the last 10 minutes of an Observation Window. If transfer of all records fail in the last 10 minutes, the full load operation stops.

dms.endpoint.elasticsearchsettings.Servi.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) used by the service to access the IAM role. The role must allow the `iam:PassRole` action.
